---
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    
---

<font size="5">

<center>**This is a collection of graphs, charts, and maps I've made using R (mainly ggplot2) to show the data-viz capabilities. Click to see more details about each plot and dataset.**</center>

</font>

----

<style>
  .col3 {
    columns: 3 270px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 3 270px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 3 300px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col3">

<font size="4"><center>**[Daily Temperatures in Kiel](https://vinhhle.github.io/kiel_temperature/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/1.kiel_temperature.png" width="270px">

<br>


<font size="4"><center>**[Migration Flows in Europe](https://vinhhle.github.io/migration_chord/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/2.migration_flow_chord_diagram.png" width="270px">

<br>

<font size="4"><center>**[World Demographics Interactive Bubble Chart](https://vinhhle.github.io/world_scatterplot/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/3.world_scatterplot.gif" width="270px">

</div>

----

<style>
  .col3 {
    columns: 3 270px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 3 270px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 3 300px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col3">

<font size="4"><center>**[Internet Users by Region](https://vinhhle.github.io/internet_wafflechart/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/internet_waffle_chart.png" width="260px">

<br>


<font size="4"><center>**[Food Mineral and Vitamin Composition](https://vinhhle.github.io/food_radarchart/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/food_radarchart.png" width="280px">

<br>

<font size="4"><center>**[Apple Stock Price and Volume History](https://vinhhle.github.io/apple_timeseries/)**</center></font>

<img src="/Users/huvi/Desktop/vinhhle.github.io/pics/apple_timeseries.png" width="300px">

</div>

----
